basic_details.job_title: Instrumentation Ltd General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Instrumentation Ltd (IL) General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website Instrumentation Ltd. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IL General Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 56 years. For internal candidates, the maximum age is 58 years as on the date of advertisement. Other age relaxations and reservations will be as per Government of India Directives.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Mechanical Engg/ Technology or its equivalent
qualification.details: Degree in Mechanical Engg/ Technology or its equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Instrumentation Ltd General Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ilpgt.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Instrumentation Ltd General Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Instrumentation Ltd General Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the General Manager post is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Mechanical Engineering/Technology or its equivalent to be eligible for the General Manager position. Please refer to the official notification for any specific details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Instrumentation Ltd General Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Manager post is 56 years. For internal candidates, the maximum age is 58 years as on the date of the advertisement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the General Manager position will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 100000 to Rs. 260000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Instrumentation Ltd General Manager job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-, and PwBD candidates are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the General Manager position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Manager post involves a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Instrumentation Ltd located?
faq.answer: Instrumentation Ltd is located in Palakkad, Kerala, with the pincode 678623. The recruitment is for positions within this organization.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for internal candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, for internal candidates, the maximum age limit is 56 years as on the date of the advertisement. Other age relaxations and reservations will be as per Government of India Directives.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Instrumentation Ltd General Manager recruitment is ILP/P&A/RR/2026.
